senses.gloss: Simsim, Semsem (a former village in what is now Israel)

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Proto-Semitic *šamn-
Akkadian šaman
Akkadian šammum
Akkadian 𒊭𒈦𒌑𒈬 (šamaššammum)bor.
Aramaic שׁוּמְשֻׁומָא (šumššumā)bor.
Arabic سمسم
Borrowed from Aramaic שׁוּמְשֻׁומָא (šumššumā), borrowed from Akkadian 𒊭𒈦𒌑𒈬 (šamaššammum), from šaman + šammum. Compare Classical Syriac ܫܘܫܡܐ (šūšmāʾ, šuššəmāʾ).
